title: cortex.audit.agentgateway.<verb>.v1 data payload
description: Stub schema for AgentGateway tool-invoke audit events. Field surface is TBD-strict — subject + timestamp are the only required keys so CORTEX_REQUIRE_ENVELOPE=1 has a target to validate against. Tighten before enforcing strict mode in production. See stacks/cortex-agentgateway/index.js → AUDIT_EVENT_TYPE.
